title: Deepcutting
body:
Stonecutters now accept normal Deepslate in recipes instead of forcing cobbled deepslate, for all of you Silk Touch-users out there.




Inspired by [NoComment1105's DeepslateCutting mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/deepslatecutting), but is available for versions 1.20+ & can be installed as a datapack. No new regular deepslate variants though, unfortunately.

![It Works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VIASEwYM/images/5a24a0fceebefb5cb9aa3e06a148d28c502cae3f.png)
